description: Data integrity — eras, flow, cross-refs, glossary, matrix, timeline, bookmarks

tests.name: Genesis chapters render
steps: Verify chapter cards render with content
Check at least one chapter has text body
tests.pass_criteria: Chapter cards render with study content

tests.name: Flow translations visible
steps: In a Genesis chapter, look for flow translation text
tests.pass_criteria: Flow translation text visible and formatted

tests.name: Cross-references work
steps: Find a cross-reference indicator in a chapter
Click it to open the xref drawer
tests.pass_criteria: Xref drawer opens with referenced passages listed

tests.name: Xref navigation
steps: With xref drawer open, click a cross-reference link
Verify navigation to the target passage
tests.pass_criteria: Clicking xref navigates to target passage

tests.name: NT text loads (Matthew)
steps: Check chapter content renders with NT material
tests.pass_criteria: Matthew loads with eras and chapter content

tests.name: Apocryphal text loads (1 Enoch)
steps: Verify eras render (no flow translations expected)
tests.pass_criteria: 1 Enoch loads, eras visible, no JS errors

tests.name: Glossary has 500+ terms
steps: Count visible glossary entries or use JS to count

tests.name: Matrix has 50+ religions
tests.pass_criteria: Bible Truth Matrix shows 50+ religion entries

tests.name: Bookmarks persist
steps: Navigate to a chapter and add a bookmark
Verify the bookmark is still present

tests.name: Reading progress tracking
steps: Verify progress counter reflects the marked chapter
tests.pass_criteria: Progress counter updates after marking chapter read

tests.name: Study trails render
steps: Find and open a study trail
Verify trail cards render with scripture references
tests.pass_criteria: Study trail cards visible with scripture refs

tests.name: Prophecy matrix
steps: Verify grid shows OT prophecy / NT fulfillment links
tests.pass_criteria: Prophecy matrix grid renders with entries

tests.name: Core beliefs
steps: Navigate to core beliefs (e.g., divine council topic)
Verify content renders with scripture references
tests.pass_criteria: Core beliefs topic renders with scripture

tests.name: Resources populate
steps: Verify resource cards render with titles and links

tests.name: Analytics tracking
steps: Check analytics data is being logged
Use JS eval to check localStorage for analytics events
